rooms.description: A cold exam room. Emily is here, watching you closely.
A ruined central lobby with overturned furniture and old blood on the floor.
A dark generator room filled with diesel fumes and broken machinery.

enemies.name: ripper
enemies.description: A hunched, doglike infected prowls near the generator.

rooms.description: A damaged research lab with broken terminals and scattered notes.

enemies.name: clicker
enemies.description: A blind creature stands motionless near the examination table, clicking softly.

rooms.description: A sealed laboratory where Dr. Zaun waits in the shadows.
A final escape route leading outside the facility.

items.name: notebook
items.description: The notebook is written in your own handwriting. One line is underlined twice: 'Find the truth. Trust no one. Especially not Dr. Zaun.' In the margin you see a number sequence: 7314.

items.name: flashlight
items.description: A flashlight with moderate battery life.

items.name: bandages
items.description: Clean bandages that may be useful later.

items.name: scrap metal
items.description: A piece of scrap metal. Could be used to make a weapon.

items.name: fuel canister
items.description: A heavy fuel canister used to restore generator power.

items.name: research notes
items.description: The notes describe NV-1 as an experimental gene therapy that failed catastrophically. One page mentions a terminal override tied to internal security protocols.

items.name: keycard
items.description: A security keycard with high-level clearance.
